member.name: M:UniversitySystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(UniversitySystem.Application.DTOs.User.CreateUser)
member.remarks: Creates a new user identity in the system with a specified role. This endpoint triggers an email confirmation flow if enabled. It validates the input against password complexity and email format rules.

member.name: M:UniversitySystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(UniversitySystem.Application.DTOs.User.UserLoginDto)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
member.remarks: The access token expires in 15 minutes. Use the refresh token endpoint to get a new one without logging in again.
member.response: Invalid credentials or account not confirmed

member.name: M:UniversitySystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.ConfirmEmail(System.String,System.String)
member.remarks: Validates a unique token sent to the user's email. This is a critical step to activate the account and permit future logins.

member.name: M:UniversitySystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.ForgotPassword(UniversitySystem.Application.DTOs.User.ForgotPasswordDto)
member.remarks: Accepts a registered email address and, if the user exists, generates a secure password reset token sent via email.

member.name: M:UniversitySystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.ResetPassword(UniversitySystem.Application.DTOs.User.ResetPasswordDto)
member.summary: Updates a user's password using a reset token.
member.remarks: Finalizes the recovery process. It validates the provided reset token and updates the user's password to the new value provided in the request body.

member.name: M:UniversitySystem.API.Controllers.AuthController.RefreshToken
member.summary: Issues a new JWT access token.
member.remarks: Exchange a valid, non-expired Refresh Token for a brand new Access Token (JWT). This allows users to stay logged in without re-entering credentials once their short-lived access token expires.
